CommunityApplications.Profile: junkerderprovinz Unraid templates. Community Applications templates for junkerderprovinz's self-hosted apps: own-image containers (BombVault, featherdrop, JDownloader, Krusader, Matrix), upstream-image wrappers (OpenHands, Standard Notes Server, Standard Notes Web UI, n8n), and the ShipLog and SmokeSignal plugins. Each app folder has its own template, icon and README; images and full source live in their per-app repositories. Maintained by junkerderprovinz; support via the per-app Unraid forum threads.
